title: Threads, Atomics, Data Races, and Safe Reclamation · Failure Case: Threadsanitizer Limit
summary: A lock-free metrics cache removes nodes while readers still hold addresses and ordinary tests rarely reproduce the race. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem threadsanitizer limit increment in threaded lifetime and reclamation proof. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use ThreadSanitizer on supported configurations while preserving stress, model, code-review, and platform evidence.
Compare locks, reference counts, hazard pointers, epochs, RCU-like schemes, and ownership transfer for safe reclamation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
